title: Show Me Report
description: Schema for JSON payloads rendered by the Show Me dashboard viewer.

id.description: Matches the blob filename (without .json). Shown as fallback title.

reportId.description: Alias for 'id' — either query param is accepted.

title.description: Display name in the dashboard header.

subtitle.description: Secondary line shown under the title.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp shown in the header (e.g. '2026-06-19T08:00:00Z').

status.description: Overall report status. Drives the header badge colour.

metadata.description: Flat key-value pairs rendered as a summary table when no category is selected (or when there are no categories). Keys should be human-readable.

categories.description: Sections listed in the sidebar. Each one contains items rendered as cards in the main area.

id.description: Stable identifier used for sidebar selection state. Use kebab-case.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in the sidebar.

status.description: Coloured dot next to the category name. Derive from worst item status if unsure.

id.description: Unique identifier within the category. Use kebab-case.

label.description: Card heading — name of the metric, check, or log entry.

value.description: Primary value shown in monospace below the label. Keep it short — a number, percentage, state string, or boolean.

details.description: One or two sentences of explanatory context shown below the value.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when this data point was recorded.

tags.description: Short pill labels for grouping or filtering (e.g. 'cpu', 'prod', 'oom').
